spec.name: PaleWound
spec.summary: A reality-altering effect that disrupts raw energy in a column volume with active regulation while it runs
spec.effect_description: Invokes a fundamental disruption to local Flux architecture. The caster inscribes a sigil that disrupts raw energy in a column volume with active regulation while it runs. Effect range: long. Persistence: permanent. Side effects on caster and casting site are documented but not fully understood.
spec.notes: Pale-class spell - use with extreme caution

all_grimoire_row: | **PaleWound** | Circle | Counter | Control | T5 | Raw | Raw | Cylinder | Long | Permanent | Filter |
